generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [ 
    base:desc "Sensors listed in the BIM environment are mirrored as Ditto devices telemetry streamed via Eclipse Hono with QoS1 and a one-second heartbeat protocol."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensors integrated into the BIM model, delivering presence data to the digital twin through Hono with QoS1 and one-second updates."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EquipmentStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Equipment status sensors reflected from BIM, transmitting operational data via Hono with QoS1 and a heartbeat interval of one second."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EquipmentStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuators defined in BIM exposed as Ditto devices, addressed by unique identifiers derived from BIM tags commands validated by Ditto pre-execution policies to enforce unit and range safety."
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting actuators mirrored from the BIM model, receiving control commands through Ditto, with safety validation ensuring values remain within allowed ranges and units."
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EquipmentStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EquipmentStatusSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Collected temperature measurements (°C) streamed via Eclipse Hono and validated by Ditto policy engine for range and unit integrity."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy telemetry gathered in real-time, delivered to Ditto for state synchronization and policy compliance."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler
]

instance EquipmentStatusData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Equipment operational status updates streamed through Hono, validated by Ditto before being applied to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EquipmentStatusDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler
]

instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched Building Information Model containing explicit sensor, actuator, and controller annotations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEPipelineEnabler
]

instance SemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic representation extracted from BIM via the Model-Driven Engineering pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEPipelineEnabler
]

instance MachineReadableModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured, machine-readable representation produced by the MDE pipeline for automated deployment."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEPipelineEnabler
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto providing policy-based validation, persistent event storage, and bidirectional state synchronization with the physical building."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, VisualizationDashboardService, ControlCommandService
]

instance HonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono handling device connectivity via MQTT topics with at-least-once delivery semantics."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, VisualizationDashboardService, ControlCommandService
]

instance MDEPipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering pipeline responsible for validating, converting, and configuring enriched BIM models into deployable digital twin artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelProcessingService
]

instance UE5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 visualizer rendering BIM geometry and exposing shared data via Ditto topics for immersive control interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance ModelProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that processes enriched BIM models into machine-readable artifacts, supporting iterative prototyping and experimentation."
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMProcessingInsight
]

    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational parameters such as temperature, occupancy, and equipment status, synchronizing physical and digital states."

]

]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

]

]

instance BIMProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from BIM processing pipeline."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time continuous synchronization between the physical building and its digital twin is supported by the framework’s data exchange layer; the documentation does not specify a fixed update interval, latency bound, or temporal granularity for individual services."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows a model‑driven engineering architecture that automatically transforms enriched BIM models into deployable Digital Twin artefacts. It consists of: (1) a BIM enrichment layer where Building Control Engineers model sensors, actuators and controllers; (2) a transformation layer that extracts structured representations via MDE techniques; (3) a central DT Framework hub that orchestrates bidirectional data exchange, runtime configuration management, and module integration through standardized extension points; and (4) an analytics/visualization layer providing interactive interfaces and real‑time monitoring. Coordination is achieved by the hub, which manages component dependencies and resource allocation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Lifecycle stages include: (1) Device and Control Modeling – Building Control Engineers embed sensors, actuators, and controllers directly into BIM models, creating semantically enriched representations; (2) Deployment Automation – The model‑driven framework applies MDE principles to transform the enriched BIM into structured artefacts and automatically generates deployable Digital Twin components, realizing the automated deployment process described in R2 (C2) and enabling reproducible setups; (3) Runtime Operation and Synchronization – Real‑time data exchange is achieved through Eclipse Hono (for MQTT/HTTP messaging) and Eclipse Ditto, enabling continuous bidirectional synchronization between physical assets and the twin; (4) Extension & Evolution – A modular architecture with defined extension points allows DT Engineers to plug in custom services (analytics, AI modules, control logic) and evolve the twin over time. Lifecycle governance is defined through explicit stakeholder roles—Building Control Engineer initiates deployment, Facility Manager monitors and operates the twin, and DT Engineer extends functionality—ensuring structured version control and reproducibility."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Deployment performance was quantified with model‑checking (5.53 s), model‑parsing (8.7 s) and initialization (0.3 s), for a total of 14.53 s.  Synchronization quality was measured by the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric over a twelve‑minute window: timeliness 0.997, reliability 1.0, availability 1.0, yielding an overall ODTE of 0.997.  Fault tolerance is achieved through Hono’s at‑least‑once delivery and Ditto’s persistent storage, while policy‑based validation ensures data quality.  No divergence between the physical building and its twin was observed during the Living Lab test.|"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Hono serves as the IoT connectivity layer while Ditto provides the digital twin repository. Together they create a bidirectional data exchange path that links physical device telemetry to twin state changes. The documents mention that the DT framework supports modular extension points for connectivity, but do not specify network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols beyond the standard mechanisms implied by using Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not in Document."
]
